## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance stable; 7 articles delivered last week, 20 published Monday, 10 awaiting review](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Pillar pages to be prioritized, shifting some reliability content to later weeks](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [Scrunch prompts revised to be more focused (83 vs. 200+); access to be shared today](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
  - [Vivek out of office for next two weeks; Mara and Ismael available for support](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [7 articles delivered last week, 20 published Monday (lower priority)](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [10 articles awaiting review](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [On track to deliver 9 articles this week, including refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Slight drop in Google clicks, but no position loss; overall positions increased](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [URLs recategorized based on Connor's feedback (category, subcategory, theme)](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustments

  - [Pillar pages to be prioritized as requested by Connor](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Shifting some reliability content to later weeks](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [Considering 50-50 split between content refreshes and net new blogs](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
  - [Updating "Last updated" dates for previously refreshed content to improve LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)

### Scrunch Prompt Revisions

  - [Reduced from 200+ to 83 more focused prompts](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
  - [Shorter, less niche prompts for better data quality](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Balancing long-tail without being too specific](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Ability to configure tracked competitors](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)

### Vivek's Upcoming Absence

  - [Out of office for next two weeks (Machu Picchu trip)](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
  - [Mara and Ismael available for support](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - [Content planned for next few weeks](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Upload revised Scrunch prompts and share access with Galileo team](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
  - [Review and update "Last updated" dates for previously refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Implement 50-50 split between content refreshes and net new blogs](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
  - [Jackson to review revised Scrunch prompts and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
  - [Continue executing on content roadmap with adjusted priorities](https://fathom.video/share/mZfQZsLfKX4hn42JmaK6NW4s_FP4oBSs?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
